reasoning: Refund request should not be processed. The order has an active FRAUD ALERT indicating the customer has an excessive refund history (15 refunds in 48 days, 83% refund rate, tracking confirms delivery) with explicit instruction to escalate to Loss Prevention. Additionally, the order is marked Complete and dates back to Feb 10, 2022, which is well outside standard refund windows. Escalating to Loss Prevention per system directive.
